faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Valley Stream homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Valley Stream, they're commonly found in kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, basement floor drains, and commercial food service areas where moisture and organic matter accumulate. Poor drainage or infrequent cleaning creates ideal breeding conditions.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Valley Stream?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Valley Stream take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and the number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat the drains with bio-enzymatic cleaners and insecticides, and provide recommendations to prevent future issues.
